overall.description: First-person walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city street (Cyberpunk 2077) during golden hour. The scene features towering chrome skyscrapers, neon signage, flying vehicles, and elevated infrastructure as the camera moves steadily along the sidewalk.

slight leftward angle adjustment while navigating past street furniture

large cylindrical building support column on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk during golden hour. A massive chrome skyscraper dominates the center view while the camera passes a large concrete pillar on the right. Modern street lamps line the left side as the pedestrian approaches the elevated transit bridge in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with steam vents and neon signs

events.description: flying aerial vehicle passes overhead from left to right
steam vent emission becomes visible from building on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the chrome tower shifts to the right periphery

notable_agents.action: aerial vehicle flying overhead across the sky between buildings

entered.detail: building facade with glowing red and yellow neon advertisements and signage
ventilation system emitting white steam smoke from building

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the chrome skyscraper moves to the right while neon commercial signage becomes visible on the left building. Steam vents emit white smoke from the right side buildings. A flying vehicle passes overhead, and the elevated transit bridge grows larger in the center view as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching elevated transit hub with neon illumination

events.description: approaching the shadow area beneath the elevated transit bridge
multiple flying vehicles visible in the sky above the buildings

agents.ego_description: approaching the large overpass structure with bright neon signs illuminating the left side

entered.detail: building covered in intense yellow neon strip lighting and glowing signage
angular commercial structure with digital displays beneath the elevated bridge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the massive elevated transit bridge which now dominates the center view. The left side features a building with intense yellow neon lighting. The chrome skyscraper has passed out of view behind, and the camera walks toward the transit terminal structure under the overpass, with multiple flying vehicles visible in the sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from a view dominated by monolithic architecture to a dense, atmospheric urban corridor. It begins with a massive chrome skyscraper centering the frame as the camera passes a large concrete pillar and a row of modern street lamps. As the walk continues, the skyscraper shifts to the right, opening up the view to reveal vibrant neon commercial signage on the left and plumes of white smoke emitting from steam vents on the right. A flying vehicle then glides overhead, adding a sense of verticality as the camera draws closer to a looming elevated transit bridge. The scene finally culminates in the bridge expanding to fill the center of the view, grounding the movement within the sprawling cyberpunk infrastructure.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement that transitions from the shadow of a chrome skyscraper toward the imposing scale of an elevated transit hub. It begins by leaving a towering metallic building behind, shifting the focus toward a massive transit bridge that gradually dominates the center of the frame. As the camera advances, the view is flanked by a building radiating intense yellow neon light, while the sky above fills with the movement of multiple flying vehicles. The scene finally culminates as the camera walks directly toward the transit terminal structure nestled beneath the sprawling overpass.
